examples: He spoke five languages and was an expert ornithologist.
I felt like an ornithologist looking for a rare species.
Forensic ornithologist Pepper Trail examines bird skeletons.
Frontman (and part-time ornithologist) Jonathan Meiburg spoke to Soundcheck host John Schaefer about Rook and led the band in performance at the WNYC Studios.
An ornithologist, he lived 'til he was 97, and so I got to see the way he would collect and classify and write systematically about his bird collection.
